generated_oml:
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor providing raw point cloud data for object detection and tracking"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARRawPointCloudData
]

instance LiDARRawPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance LiDARProcessedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed LiDAR point cloud data containing object tracks and vehicle state information"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARRawPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringEnabler
]

instance TranslatedPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Serialized and translated point cloud data for inter-entity communication"
]

instance PointCloudClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processes raw LiDAR point cloud data into object tracks and vehicle state information"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Handles data serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversions to ensure consistency across all data streams"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time visualization of vehicle state, projected driving path, and detected object tracks via UI supports viewing, saving, and generating reports"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualization, ProjectedDrivingPath, DetectedObjectTracks, ReportGeneration
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC system computations (lead vehicle detection, speed computation based on distance) to cloud resources, with results sent back to vehicle for actuation"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetection, SpeedComputation
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Allows operators to enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, and send emergency braking commands from remote location"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCEnableDisable, DesiredSpeedSetting, EmergencyBrakingCommand
]

instance VehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state for monitoring and analysis"
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPath : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected path of the vehicle based on current driving conditions"
]

instance DetectedObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Tracking of detected objects in the vehicle's environment"
]

instance ReportGeneration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Capability to save and generate reports from monitored data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LeadVehicleDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection and tracking of lead vehicles for adaptive cruise control"
]

instance SpeedComputation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Computation of appropriate speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
]

instance ACCEnableDisable : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable or disable Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DesiredSpeedSetting : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for Adaptive Cruise Control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Send emergency braking command from remote location"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User-facing environment for monitoring and control"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital twin entity responsible for data management and control"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical twin entity responsible for data pre-processing, actuation, device communication, and point cloud clustering"
]

instance 3DVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D visualization component for real-time vehicle state and object tracking display"
    base:isContainedIn UserEntity
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User interface for remote control and system management"
    base:isContainedIn UserEntity
]

instance DataManagementComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component responsible for managing data within the digital twin"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance ControlComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component for handling control commands and system configuration"
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance DataPreprocessingComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component for initial data processing before transmission"
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance ActuationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component for vehicle actuation based on control commands"
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance DeviceCommunicationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component handling communication between physical and virtual components"
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance PointCloudClusteringComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Software component responsible for point cloud clustering and tracking of detected objects"
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Clock synchronization with 100 ms accuracy is required for device coordination during computation offloading in safety-critical vehicular applications, constrained by hardware limitations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Architecture follows ISO 23247 RA, implementing Functional Entities as ROS2 packages containing ROS2 nodes; entities (User, Digital Twin, Physical Twin) are deployed on distinct hardware, with Physical Twin Entity hosting general automotive functionality like Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs within a ROS2 network, while inter-entity communication occurs over a Wi-Fi network using UDP in the transport layer."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system complies with ISO 23247, a standard for manufacturing comprising four parts: Overview and general principles, Reference architecture, Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements, and Information exchange. Part 2 defines an entity-based reference architecture with Observable Manufacturing Elements (OMEs), Data Collection and Device Control Entities, Digital Twin Entities, and User Entities. Functional Entities (FEs) within these entities handle tasks like actuation, data transformation, and user interfacing; however, the standard does not specify implementation details for FEs, with OPC Unified Architecture cited as an example for data collection and control."
]
